programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Camino a rentar una película, el Noruego adquiere una nueva mascota. En tanto, Peluzín tiene que mudarse de su departamento por falta de pago.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego se topa con un niño de la calle con quien supuestamente mantiene un parentesco mientras que Peluzín organiza un negocio piramidal para aprovecharse de todos los del edificio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un incidente hace que Irma revalore su vida y desaparezca. Mientras el Abuelo y el Noruego tratan de encontrarla, Gaspar y Jonathan tratan de encontrarle su lugar a Olaf en la familia.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Independientemente de resultado de las elecciones norteamericanas, Donald Trump decide declarale la guerra a México y LFDB se embarca en una misión especial para derrocar al tirano Trump.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: En una parodia de La Rosa de Guadalupe, el Abuelo es encarado por su familia para tratarse su adicción al sexo, mientras que Peluzín se aprovecha de Olaf para establecer un negocio ilícito en la escuela.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Una hilarante parodia de A Christmas Carol, en la que al Abuelo se le aparecen fantasmas del pasado presente y futuro. Olaf es Timmy y Peluzin el fantasma.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar cansado de la ineficiencia y corrupción decide postularse como servidor público, mientras que Irma es grabada en una situación incómoda, convirtiéndose en una celebridad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelúzín se roba un paquete de la puerta de Don Sebas, volteando a todo el edificio de cabeza, mientras Jonathan, cansado del bullying del Abuelo decide darle una lección.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: LFDB decide hacerle una intervención al Abuelo porque está mas hostil que nunca y quieren que busque tratamiento médico, mientras que Peluzín y Jonathan ayudan a Pitipú a conseguir su nacionalidad.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Despúes de una ardua búsqueda el Noruego encuentra a su padre, mientras que Jonathan ayuda a Peluzín a llevar una vida de bien.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego decide recuperar a su antigua mascota tlacuache llamada Chofri, mientras que el Abuelo atraviesa por un lapso de demencia senil y depende de Gaspar salvarlo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Un extraño bebé aparece en la puerta de LFDB, quien viene acarreando una ola de destrucción. Ahora la salvación del mundo depende de la Familia del Barrio.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo consigue una ocupación donde se siente como pez en el agua, mientras que Peluzín entra en un proyecto experimental que le traerá muchos problemas a todos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Gaspar encuentra por fin el amor de manera inesperada mientras que el Pasita, triste por las limitaciones de su edad avanzada consigue la receta para la eterna juventud.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Frustrado por su trabajo, Gaspar busca apoyo en el Abuelo y el Noruego y termina accidentado. Mientras, gracias a la medicina experimental, Peluzín se convierte en el Dr Lambretón.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo y el Noruego buscan nuevos horizontes a través de la creación de una fundación, mientras Peluzín cae en la cuenta de su soledad y sale a buscar amigos.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego aprende inglés y se prepara para vivir el sueño americano. En tanto, el Abuelo llega a un reencuentro con sus ex-compañeros de colegio y descubre una verdad sepultada por el tiempo.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La Familia abre un grupo de WhatsApp para estar más conectados pero este se sale de control, mientras que Peluzín aprrovecha una noticia de un asesinato para sacarle dinero a Pitipú.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd TVSP #19: The Elusiveness of the Fog
programme.desc: Lupin's attempt to steal a time machine causes a crazy mishap! Now stuck in ancient Japan, his team and Inspector Zenigata must join forces to get back to their own time. But notorious thief Lupin has enemies everywhere... and everywhen!

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #20: Sweet Lost Night
programme.desc: Turns out the Magic Lamp is real, and Lupin's found a way to steal it! But this genie has a price: to grant his wish, she demands half his memories.

programme.title: LUPIN THE 3rd TVSP #21: The Last Job
programme.desc: Lupin and his companions have their sights on a Japanese cultural treasure, a priceless Buddha statue. But when a mysterious group of ninja thieves get the jump on them, it might just be the gang's last job!

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Fujiko Mine, the devastatingly sexy lady thief who'll stop at nothing to make her steal, has her sights set on a religious cult's secret treasure when a new man waltzes into her life: Lupin III.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: A war is going down between the Italian and Chinese Mafias, and Fujiko ends up in the middle of it. A mysterious bodyguard named Daisuke Jigen stands at the heart of the matter, but who knows whose side he's really on?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: She's always getting in trouble / But she may give you a square deal / She's always sharing everything / Except for every steal / Even a lowly samurai / Is quick to see the appeal / How do you solve a problem like Fujiko Mine?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: The famous diva Aiyan's bejeweled mask has been targeted by Lupin the Third, and Zenigata determines to "set a thief to catch a thief." Who will get to the mask first: Fujiko or Lupin?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Using her womanly wiles, Fujiko convinces Lupin to retrieve the legendary Laughing Peacock from an Egyptian pyramid. However, the seemingly simple job turns into a fierce race when Jigen sets his sights on the treasure too.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Fujiko infiltrates a Catholic girls' school and sets about stealing all the maidens' hearts to pave the way for an even bigger theft. But Oscar knows exactly what she's up to, and he's got a plan to stop her.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: The nation of Carib is in political upheaval, and Fujiko is in the thick of the action, naturally. What is she doing posing as a reporter? Will revolutionary Philadel Kest win her heart where Lupin has failed? And what is Goemon doing on that fighter jet?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: A fortune-teller supposedly able to predict his clients' deaths is for some reason seeking out Lupin's prior victims and giving them some very disturbing readings. What's the connection to Fujiko Mine, and how far will she go to see this job through?

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Magical realism plus human trafficking plus Lupin and Daisuke Jigen plus a spa vacation plus Fujiko off the deep end equals... Well, you'll just have to find out.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Count Almeida has a job for Lupin, and he's not about to take no for an answer. When Lupin and Zenigata both separately make their way to the Count's villa seeking answers, the trail of clues leads to a ghost town with just one inhabitant.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: A recent string of particularly flashy thefts has been tied to Fujiko Mine, who seems to have taken to sending written warnings to the police just like Lupin does. But if you ask Inspector Zenigata, something smells fishy about the whole thing.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: Oscar's body is missing, girls are being kidnapped all over the world, and Lupin still hasn't made good on his threat to steal Fujiko Mine. There's only one thing to do: It's time to pay a visit to one Count Luís Yu Almeida.

programme.title: Lupin the 3rd: The Woman Called Fujiko Mine
programme.desc: In the season finale, all the players have finally come together, and it's time to see how the tale ends.

programme.title: Lupin The 3rd "Good-Bye Partner"
programme.desc: When Zenigata is arrested for suspicion of being part of the Lupin gang, Lupin is talked into stealing Time Crystal to prove Pops' innocence.

programme.title: Lupin The 3rd "Blood Seal of the Eternal Mermaid"
programme.desc: The Mermaid's Scale is a mysterious aquamarine gemstone that Lupin has been hired to steal it... but it turns out to be a forgery. Now, he needs to find the real jewel before it can be used to destroy the whole world!

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: The Hills

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.title: Súper Shore

programme.desc: Altman hunts for his own flagship office space to create some distance from Fredrik Eklund, a former friend who is trying to make his mark on both coasts; Flagg tries to convince his hesitant seller to put in an offer or lose the home forever.

programme.desc: Altman struggles to retain an unrealistic seller; Tracy tries to attract interest for a new construction with mid-century bones; Flagg's resort-style trophy listing proves more challenging than expected.

programme.title: Million Dollar Listing Los Angeles
programme.desc: James and David experience difficulties with their Santa Monica gem, as the sellers have their own ideas about price and who the buyers should be.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The IMF continues to battle slave-trading in a Middle Eastern country by eliminating De Groot, one of the principal suppliers of victims for King Borca's slave market.

programme.desc: The IMF races against time to convince the president (Pernell Roberts) of a small country that his chief of secret police plans to overthrow the government and seize power.

programme.desc: The economy of the small African country of Ghalea is threatened by a mass counterfeiting scheme directed by Walter DuBruis, one of the country's richest financiers.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: The fraudulent international activities of Gerald and Catherine Hagar, professional fund raisers for charity, take the IMF to an estate on the French-Italian border.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Jim Phelps leads the IMF on an assignment to destroy the syndicate, a criminal empire headed by Frank Wayne.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.desc: The IMF accepts a critical mission to rescue Nikolai Kurzon, the leader-in-exile of the Baltic state of Veyska who has been kidnapped by Col. Stahl (Steve Ihnat), head of the secret police.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.title: Mission: Impossible

programme.desc: NATO's missile defense system plans, mapped on two separate overlays for security reasons, are the target of a Central European spy organization.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers invites viewers along on a visit to a special new playground designed and built by both adults and children. He makes up a song at the piano.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers introduces his television Neighbors to gymnast Chaney Umphrey when he visits at his gym and watches as he exercises. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, mischievous Lady Elaine Fairchilde reveals a mystery!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a toy factory where people make plastic molded tricycles, and he receives a visit from folk singer Ella Jenkins who collects toy tops from around the world.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers flies a balsa wood airplane, and Mr. McFeely visits an airport control tower. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Prince Tuesday discovers that learning to ride a bike isn't always easy!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows how empty containers plus some imagination can create a whole Neighborhood. In Make-Believe, Ana Platypus is jealous of Prince Tuesday's new bike and angry because her parents aren't buying one for her.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits a toy lending library and sees children playing with different kinds of toys. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Prince Tuesday learns to ride his bike, and also learns to share it!

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a raincoat and talks about things to do inside. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Aberlin dances in the rain. X flies to slide down a rainbow. Daniel wants to learn Tai Chi to stop his scary dreams.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers hangs a fish mobile, then goes to see some killer whales swim and play. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Lady Elaine teaches dance and says males weren't invited to the studio because they don't dance.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers visits Sam Weber and sees him dance. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday XIII goes to Lady Elaine's dance school, and she turns him away claiming that men can't dance. Sam Weber arrives and dances.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers helps to weave a scarf. Henrietta Pussycat's ballet teacher, Miss Cloud, does not speak but communicates with movement. The Junior Tamburitzans perform two folk dances. Mister Rogers talks about making up stories and dances.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers, with the help of his ventriloquist dummy, learns that sign language and talking can be two different ways of saying the same thing.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows a video of children's television programs from around the world. Queen Sara Saturday and Mayor Maggie prepare for their job switch. Nancy Caterpillar is anxious to transition into being a butterfly.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a dog. Bob Trow stops by with the Bob Dog costume. Prince Tuesday fears that the change will be permanent. Neighbor Aber arrives to explain that the switch is just temporary.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers arrives with a clown mask. "Mayor" Sara prepares a speech as two lost clowns arrive. To help the clowns find their way to the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Queen Sara suggests that she and Mayor Maggie trade jobs.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Nancy Caterpillar sees herself in a mirror and realizes that she is very special the way she is. She turns into a butterfly. Mister Rogers visits the circus and sees Jeff Gabel apply his clown make-up.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers shows pictures of the night and day skies. He plays with a star on a string and then remembers his trip to Moscow, where he met Russian children's television program producers. There is a pretend star falling from a string.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers has some scuba diving equipment and imagines what a real scuba diver would see in the ocean. Some of the neighbors are frightened by Chuck Aber and Betty Okonak Templeton Jones in their scuba diving gear.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Russian children's television host Tatiana Vedeneeva vists Mister Rogers and takes out a puppet from her program -- Stepashka, a very brave rabbit. In the Neighborhood, a visitor from the stars lands at the Museum-Go-Round.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers meets yo-yo expert Tom Parks and shows a film about nighttime workers. Daniel talks with Yo-Yo LaBelle, who is sad because he will have to leave the neighborhood at daybreak.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister McFeely delivers the wrong video tape. Mister Rogers reassures Mr. McFeely by singing You Are Special. King Friday is angry and belittles Miss Paulificate when she mistakenly delivers garden hoes instead of garden hose.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers and Eric Kloss visit a cavern led by Betty Aberlin. Inside the cavern, Mr. Kloss plays his saxophone while Mister Rogers plays an organ. In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, King Friday hires a tutor for Prince Tuesday.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Marilyn Barnett stops by along with three students who demonstrate their jump roping skills. Lady Aberlin encourages Prince Tuesday to tell his father he wants to stay at Someplace Else School.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: In the Neighborhood of Make-Believe, Broadway superstar Tommy Tune enchants the Neighbors with his dancing and his kindness.

programme.title: Mister Rogers' Neighborhood
programme.desc: Mister Rogers recalls when he was discouraged after someone told him he could not do something well. He kindly answers a phone call which turns out to be a wrong number. Sir Thomas Tune is popular among the school children.

programme.desc: Cuando Arnold salva a Sid de que un letrero le caiga encima, Sid se convierte en el esclavo personal de Arnold aunque éste se opone / Arnold y Gerald deciden tomarse el día libre de la escuela.

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!

programme.title: ¡Oye Arnold!
programme.desc: Una ola de calor invade la ciudad. Los chicos deben pasar por todas las torturas del calor, incluyendo soportar al heladero y sus precios elevados. / Es la primera nevada del año y Arnold sólo desea jugar.

programme.desc: Out and about in Dressrosa, Luffy and his team encounter a mysterious and powerful blind gambler - and run into trouble while his shocking powers distract everyone! Meanwhile, a major event in the Colosseum draws huge crowds.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro, Sanji, and Kin'emon strike off in search of the thieving fairy who has taken Zoro's sword, but Sanji finds himself mesmerized by the beautiful dancing of a gorgeous Dressrosa woman - with a deadly secret!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy enters the Corrida Colosseum in order to compete for Ace's Flare-Flare Fruit! But with the mightiest warriors of the New World assembled and standing in his way, the competition will not be easy. The first stage of the competition is a battle royal.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: While the deadly battle of Block A winds down, all the onlookers in the stadium are shocked to discover the secret identity of the winner! Meanwhile, Luffy's cover may be blown as another voice from the past returns.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Luffy meets an unexpected acquaintance from the past, Bellamy, who seems to be up to no good! Meanwhile, Caesar Handover Team encounters a snag when they learn just how dangerous Green Bit is!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle heats up and the widely despised Bartolomeo takes the ring! But he'll have to contend with both the Prodence Kingdom contingent, and Dressrosa's own local favorite, Bellamy! From up above, Luffy risks having his cover blown!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Don Chinjao continues to provoke Luffy, hoping to gain revenge against the grandson of his sworn enemy, Garp! But as the argument continues, Luffy risks having his cover blown, and his identity revealed! Meanwhile, the battle in Block B rages.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: The battle for Block B hits a crescendo as King Elizabello II prepares his devastating King Punch! But as the powerful attack becomes imminent, the Prodence Kingdom faction unravels! All that may be pointless, though.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: As the handover team approaches Green Bit, they are attacked by the fearsome fish that live off the coast of Dressrosa. But that's the least of their problems as they find the bridge to Green Bit has collapsed!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Zoro tracks the thief who stole his sword - and learns about a danger facing the Straw Hats! Meanwhile, Law, Usopp, and the others arrive at Green Bit only to find it inhabited by strange creatures, and swarming with the Navy soldiers!

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: All but done for, Sanji is trapped by Violet and her crew when she suddenly changes her mind and mysteriously turns on her own men! Meanwhile, Robin and Usopp come face to face with the Little People known as the Tontatta Tribe.

programme.title: One Piece
programme.desc: Sanji gets in touch with Law in order to share a shocking secret - that could unsettle the Straw Hats' plans in Dressrosa for good! Meanwhile, Luffy's Block C battle begins, but will his Gum-Gum powers give him away?

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The crew of Andromeda is still learning how to work together as they are attacked by the Restorers.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda gets involved in a feud between a Than planet and a Nietzschean colony. Tyr must choose between his clan or his new family aboard the Andromeda.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A slipstream sends the Andromeda back in time to just before the Commonwealth fell. The crew must intervene to preserve history.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Answering a distress call leads the crew to pick up Beka's brother, now a Wayist, and his friend. They are connected to environmentalists trying to prevent space travel.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: A black hole allows Dylan to communicate with his former fiancee, 300 years in the past. He can't abandon his mission to reform the Commonwealth, but can he bring her into the future?

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is imprisoned on a prison planet and must stage an escape as his crew tries to stage their own rescue.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Castalians board the Andromeda to finalize the charter for the New Commonwealth. When the leader is discovered dead, Tyr is the main suspect.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Beka learns that her father's former business partner deals in a highly addictive drug called Flash. The rest of the crew holds a "garage sale" to earn money for new ship parts.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: The Andromeda discovers her "sister ship", the Pax Magellanic. The crew aboard Pax is 300 years old, but have not aged a day

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Tyr crash lands the Eureka Maru on a Nietzschean planet and develops amnesia. He must remember what he is doing before the Nietzscheans discover him and his crate of stolen goods.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Harper receives the "gift" of knowledge from a dying Perseid, only to discover that the Perseid was being hunted by a bounty hunter, who has now turned his attention to Harper.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Dylan is arrested for assassinating a dictator 300 years ago, by the man he helped install in his place. The new dictator ended up being much, much worse.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Andromeda is boarded by a drone from the Consensus of Parts, a mythical mechanical society. While friendly at first, the drone tries to force the ship to join the Consensus.

programme.title: Gene Roddenberry's Andromeda
programme.desc: Gerentex is back and demands Trance and Harper help him with his new scheme: finding Tarn-Vedra.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: Kathy Lujan, a married mother of two young boys, is believed to have run away with one of her lover; Detective Rosie Rodriguez chases a trail of evidence and suspects that reveal the truth about Kathy's whereabouts.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A woman discovers the body of her nephew and investigators must unravel the events that led to his demise, but with three viable suspects, it takes about a year to crack the case using the smallest piece of DNA evidence from the crime scene.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After authorities finally identify the prolific Green River Killer, it becomes a cat-and-mouse game as they must get inside his mind to get him to lead them to the remains of other missing women.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: A year after a popular high school senior goes missing, a witness comes forward claiming to know who is responsible for her disappearance and detectives must unravel a web of lies in order to learn the truth.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After a hard working Virginia couple is brutally murdered on the eve of their anniversary, the ensuing investigation goes cold until detectives find the most unlikely of suspects.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions
programme.desc: After the naked body of an Ohio State senior is found, investigators bring in a suspect for questioning; they play a dangerous game of give and take hoping to get the truth and bring justice to the victim and her family.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: Criminal Confessions

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a family that runs a beloved vet clinic is gunned down, police investigate disgruntled tenants, a pet owner with an ax to grind and an estranged son; the case stalls until detectives uncover a twisted plot by someone who seemed above suspicion.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer
programme.desc: When a young mother and beloved coworker is found stabbed in her bedroom, investigators are unable to pin down a killer until secret recordings and evidence stashed in a van are found.

programme.title: An Unexpected Killer

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Maura becomes the key suspect in a homicide case when her date turns up dead -- and Maura can't remember the evening. Jane struggles between protecting her friend and doing her job.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Maura and Jane unravel a shocking secret about Paddy (JOHN DOMAN) and Hope (SHARON LAWRENCE) that affects them all. Korsak opens up about Cavanaugh's tragic past.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: When a beleaguered Jane spills hot coffee on a stranger, a viral video of Jane's bad day could jeopardize her career. Plus, a puzzling murder case involving a conspiracy theorist.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A popular high school teacher is killed. The squad works on the case, but Jane is preoccupied with Lt. Martinez's (AMAURY NOLASCO) seeming favoritism towards his own drug unit.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Frankie Jr. is brought in to help with a gruesome murder case involving a youth hockey league. Cailin (EMILEE WALLACE) asks to stay with Maura.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Jane and Maura begin a simulation of investigating serial killer Charles Hoyt's murders at a symposium for law enforcement, and come across a horrifying discovery.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Summer finale: Conflicting evidence muddies a case. Maura debates taking in her paroled grandfather (RICHARD HERD). Jane and Casey (CHRIS VANCE) evaluate where things stand.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: When a kidnapper who dresses as a clown reemerges after 20+ years, the squad digs for clues from the unsolved abductions of 1988. Jane and Casey (CHRIS VANCE) become more serious.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A singer/guitar player is brutally and mysteriously stabbed in a bar -- but did the victim have something to hide? Jane's dad (CHAZZ PALMINTERI) returns, and he's got shocking news.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: A food truck chef dies suddenly, prompting many questions. Tommy (COLIN EGGLESFIELD) announces plans that have Angela excited. Maura's birth mother (SHARON LAWRENCE) reaches out.

programme.title: Rizzoli & Isles
programme.desc: Homeland Security steps in when a senator's daughter is murdered. Tommy (COLIN EGGLESFIELD) and Frankie get into a fight. Jane reveals shocking news that could be life-changing.

programme.title: Gangs Of New York

programme.title: Big Top Pee-Wee
programme.desc: In Big Top Pee-Wee, I live on a country farm where I feed my barnyard animals pancake breakfasts and work on top-secret botanical experiments with my pet pig, Vance.

programme.title: Nazi Hunters

programme.title: Nazi Hunters

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive

programme.title: I Shouldn't Be Alive

programme.title: Intervention

programme.desc: Erin is a strong-willed Texan who relies on her good looks to get what she wants, which is meth.

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Raised by an absentee alcoholic father, Jimmy joined a gang at 13 and was soon addicted to heroin.

programme.title: Intervention

programme.title: Intervention
programme.desc: Jimbo's addiction to painkillers has already resulted in a devastating injury and a strained relationship with his devoted dad.

programme.title: Hoarders

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: For nearly five years, Hitler's Third Reich has dominated Europe. Germany braces for an Allied invasion, fortifying the Atlantic Wall with steel, concrete, and advanced weaponry.

programme.title: WWII In Color: From D-Day to Nazi Downfall
programme.desc: After 18 months of preparation, the Allied Expeditionary Force launches the largest amphibious landing in history, with 160,000 troops storming the Normandy coast.

programme.title: Secrets of War

programme.desc: After Nazi Germany's invasion and capture of France, French citizens take it upon themselves to wage a guerrilla campaign against their occupiers.

programme.title: Secrets of War

programme.desc: A survey of Hitler's early years. Nazism. His appointment as Chancellor and the men in his Government.

programme.desc: Cassino. Anzio. Liberation of Rome. The Gothic Line. Liberation of Italy.

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles

programme.title: Greatest Tank Battles

programme.title: Battleplan
programme.desc: Assault from the Air introduces a third dimension to a battlefield. The program focuses on the key requirements in a Battleplan for Assault from the Air and the changes that technology has brought.

programme.title: Battleplan

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo
programme.desc: Mientras todos se divierten en la fiesta, se enteran que Coraima fue trasladada a la clínica. Entre tanto, Clara debe ser sincera con los dos hombres que se disputan su amor. Posteriormente, Teto y Doña Nena se ven envueltos en líos con la Policía.

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo
programme.desc: Teto quiere hacer un trato con el Comandante a cambio de liberar a Nena. Por otro lado, Mariela le aconseja a Jacinto pagar la deuda que tiene con la alcaldía y evitar problemas. Reginaldo le hace una propuesta a Clara difícil de rechazar.

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo
programme.desc: Teto se enfrenta a Stroller y pone su vida en peligro durante el operativo de captura. Entre tanto, Jacinto podría perder su casa por la deuda que tiene. Dionisio y su grupo, emocionados con lo que está pasando, firman autógrafos y saludan a sus fans.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia presiona a Eva para que le diga si efectivamente Luis Mario se enamoró de Rosaura, pero ella no se lo confirma y en cambio la amenaza con hacerle saber a Luis Mario el secreto de su vida.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Camelia abraza a Luis Mario y le exige que vuelvan a ser la pareja feliz de antes, ya que ella lo quiere recuperar. Karina se fastidia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Luis Mario y Eva discuten por Rosaura, cuando llega Luisana. Eva descarga su mal humor con ella y cuando Luis Mario se aleja, la amenaza con botarla de la casa por Eduarda y Camelia.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Rosaura le cuenta todo a doña Cruz. Doña Cruz ofrece su ayuda para que Rosaura se pueda vengar de los que le hicieron daño. Camelia y Luis Mario están haciendo el amor.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje
programme.desc: Iván le informa a Rosaura que Luis Mario está muy grave. Despues, Rosaura quiere ir donde Luis Mario. Griselda le cuenta a María Julia lo que está pasando en la casa con Rosaura.

programme.title: Gata Salvaje

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo

programme.title: Rafael Orozco, el ídolo
programme.desc: Reginaldo intenta besar a Clara y la invita a un evento que tiene en la noche. En Bogotá, la Profesora le dice a Rafael que su voz es perfecta para la balada y lo inscribirá en un concurso. Esa noche, Reginaldo y Clara van a una velada romántica.

programme.title: Unsealed Alien Files
programme.desc: An extraterrestrial threat. A top secret organization. Has the US made contact with aliens? Experts believe they have. And an ultra top secret organization is calling all the shots.

programme.title: Unsealed Alien Files
programme.desc: Many UFO sightings are solitary events that leave witnesses scrambling to prove their story. But what happens when the same object is seen by many people at the same time?

programme.title: Unsealed Alien Files
programme.desc: More than half the world's UFO sightings happen over water. Many of these phenomena are seen bursting from the ocean into the sky. Do aliens lurk in our oceans?

programme.title: Unsealed Alien Files
programme.desc: What does the American government really know about UFO's? And how far will they go to hide the truth? In 1948 a fireball crashes near Laredo, Texas. They say it was an experimental aircraft.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team travels to Vietnam in search of a bipedal ape called the Wildman.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Return to Boggy Creek
programme.desc: The team travels to Fouke, AR, home of the 1972 bigfoot documentary, "The Legend of Boggy Creek." With a long history of sightings near this small town, the team takes to the surrounding swamps in hopes of proving Arkansas' bigfoot is more than a legend.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Surfs Up, Sasquatch
programme.desc: The team travels to Santa Cruz to visit the Bigfoot Discovery Museum. The museum's owner directs them to recent eyewitnesses and secret hotspots. Bobo hopes the smells from an authentic Hawaiian luau will be too much for nearby bigfoots to resist.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Best Evidence Yet
programme.desc: The team returns to Florida to investigate thermal footage of a possible bigfoot. Convinced of the evidence, they revisit witnesses from previous expeditions and narrow their search to a recent hotspot.

programme.title: Finding Bigfoot: Kung-Fu Bigfoot
programme.desc: The team travels to China in search of the Yeren, a bipedal, hair-covered ape similar to Bigfoot. Little is known about this elusive creature, but the team uses their bigfooting skills to try and prove China's Yeren is more than just legend.

programme.title: Pasión de gavilanes

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones

programme.title: Tierra de pasiones

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: La patrona

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch's tiny fire-eating mother visits and demands that Lurch's employers wait on her boy hand-and-foot after Lurch leads her to believe that it's his house. Lurch revels in the unexpected attention he gets from Morticia and Gomez.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's electrical output fails abruptly. Should they call a doctor or an electrician to bring Fester back? Morticia prescribes a bowl of porcupine mold, and both she and Gomez agree that long exposure to moon rays would be beneficial.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The family would like to vacation on the moon, but the billion-dollar travel cost is slightly prohibitive. Uncle Fester volunteers $21.13 and Morticia, using Gomez's new supercomputer, suggests placing a $2,000 bet on the daily double horse race.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Cousin Itt is advocated as curator of the local zoo. Gomez uses his influence with Park Commissioner Fisk (guest star Alan Reed) to promote Itt for the job, but the zookeepers are convinced the Addamses' cousin should be confined to a cage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Grandmama (Blossom Rock) is hauled off to jail for setting up a fortune-telling booth in the Addamses' living room. Gomez (John Astin) volunteers to act as attorney, and the court session becomes a shambles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez (John Astin) loses his memory after hitting his head; he fails to recognize Morticia (Carolyn Jones) and says the house looks like a condemned museum. The Addamses take turns hitting Gomez on the head trying to help him regain his memory.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Thing disappears from his box. Failing to find a single trace of Thing, Gomez (John Astin) conducts an investigation--with all members of the household under suspicion. Also starring Carolyn Jones, Jackie Coogan, and Ted Cassidy.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester applies for a job as an insurance salesman with the same company which is threatening to cancel the Addamses' policy (because Fester keeps blowing things up). Fester convinces the company interviewer that he is qualified for the job.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Lurch becomes inconsolable when Gomez donates the family antique harpsichord to a collector. Gomez and Morticia offer Lurch a balalaika and a set of drums. When this proves unsatisfactory, Gomez and Fester decide to build a new harpsichord.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: When Morticia hears the stock market has crashed, she assumes that Gomez has been financially wiped out and rallies the family to help make money. Morticia gives lessons, Lurch and Fester run an escort service, and the kids run a poison drink stand.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While enjoying a moonlight picnic and snail hunt, the Addams Family is mistaken for Martians by uniformed investigators from Mysterious Space Objects Headquarters. In turn, Gomez (John Astin) and the clan regard their inquisitors with suspicion.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: An organ grinder's fugitive monkey leads Fester to believe that he has turned Pugsley into a monkey. Morticia and Gomez treat the monkey as though he were their son, welcoming him to the dinner table and giving him Pugsley's chores.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia's favorite charity is having an auction--so Morticia persuades her family to part with things to sell. Donations include Wednesday's headless doll, the old flogging table, a stuffed vulture and Uncle Fester's dynamite.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: The Addams Family ignores notices that their house is to be condemned to make way for a freeway. When sudden explosions cannot be traced to any member of the family but, instead, to city workmen, Gomez is forced to consider moving the house.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Uncle Fester's pen pal, Madelyn, is coming to visit. Fester panics, as he has described himself as handsome, heroic and romantic. Gomez and Morticia agree that all Fester needs is a toupee and they help him make several styles.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez are worried about Cousin Itt because he spends his days sleeping and dreaming in his tiny room. They decide that Itt would make an excellent marriage counselor, and pretend to be a couple with a failing marriage.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: A recording company's platter of Lurch's gravelly voice brings a screaming mob of teenage fans to the Addams house. To calm the crowd, Lurch seats himself at the harpsichord and rewards his fans with a song to end all songs.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Taken in by a psychologist's pronouncement that the only happily married couples are those who fight members of the Addams household devise schemes to start a battle between Gomez (John Astin) and Morticia (Carolyn Jones).

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Gomez decides to bolster Cousin Itt's failing ego by making him the star of a production aimed as a birthday surprise for Wednesday. He hires the great director, Eric von Bissell, who gives Itt elocution lessons, causing a Hollywood star complex.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: While Morticia and Gomez are celebrating their 13th wedding anniversary, she tells Wednesday and Pugsley a bedtime story of how she and Gomez first met. In this episode, Carolyn Jones plays Morticia, Morticia as a 22-year-old, and sister Ophelia.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley refuse to go to bed until they hear the rest of the courtship story. Morticia resumes the tale via flashback, including the ceremony beginning with Ophelia Frump, Morticia's balmy sister, as the bride.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Romance seems close for Thing, the Addams right-hand-in-a-box, when Gomez's aunt arrives for a visit accompanied by Lady Fingers, her handmaiden. Thing enjoys the visit most because it gives him a chance to hold hands with one of his own kind.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Morticia and Gomez visit Mayor Henson to complain that their property tax is ridiculously low. After the Mayor proves his incompetence by offering a refund, Gomez is persuaded to become a candidate for the office.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: During a welcome home party for Cousin Itt, Morticia notices that the diminutive guest of honor seems to be losing his hair. Uncle Fester experiments with his chemistry set to produce a concoction that grows hair and tries the remedy on Itt.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Wednesday and Pugsley return in tears from trick-or-treating because a neighbor has told them there is no such thing as a witch. Morticia and Gomez plan to prove to the children that they do exist--by summoning a witch to a séance.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: Determined to correct the dreadful literature that Wednesday and Pugsley are exposed to, Morticia sets out to create a new literary world. Gomez fears that his wife's first manuscript is so good, that once the publisher reads it he will lose her.

programme.title: The Addams Family
programme.desc: In need of artistic fulfillment, Morticia takes up sculpting. An art critic views her first endeavor--a three-eyed Gomez statue--and clubs it with his cane. Gomez, who won't have Morticia's heart broken gets a seedy art dealer to buy it.

programme.desc: Racers Dangle from amazing heights to retrieve their first clue in Antwerp Belgium.

programme.title: The Amazing Race
programme.desc: Things get slimy at a fishy challenge in Tangiers. Morocco.

programme.title: Hardwood Classics
programme.desc: Stephen Curry's scoop shot seals Warriors' 141-139 win over OKC in a thrilling NBA Cup game.

programme.title: Hardwood Classics
programme.desc: The exciting Kings of Chris Webber and Jason Williams get it done against the Wolves in a game in Japan. From Nov. 11, 1999.

programme.title: NBA Documentaries
programme.desc: Watch the Oklahoma City Thunder's journey turning potential into NBA championship power.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Approximately 1.8 million Americans are reported missing each year. Some are runaways who find their way home, but others simply disappear. When foul play is suspected, investigators turn to forensics to find the missing.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Sometimes, the cause of death does not match the scene of the crime. When an untraceable poison is used to commit murder, homicide detectives turn to forensic toxicologists to follow a killer's tracks and expose a toxic death.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When killers are driven by jealousy and desire, their desperation is evident in both the crime and their efforts to avoid detection. But forensic science can reveal even the slightest mistake to solve crimes of passion.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators rely on forensic odontology to identify a body from a single tooth and to catch two brutal killers from their bite marks.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: No matter how chaotic or how clean a crime scene appears to be, the culprit is bound to leave something telling behind. Occasionally, it's nothing more than a fingerprint or shoe tread. Sometimes that's all that's needed.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: There's never a good reason for murder, but some killers are particularly brutal—choosing their prey at random or with no apparent motive and then cunningly covering their tracks. Even so, telltale clues remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear – kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A good coroner provides what's necessary to solve a crime. A bad one can spoil an otherwise rock-solid case. Cyril Wecht and Henry Lee, two of the country's most respected coroners, share their cases and insights into crime solving.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The show examines cases of poison and deadly chemistry and shows how forensic experts are solving mysterious deaths today and from the past.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Hiding a body can be difficult; it's sometimes easier to obscure or disguise the circumstances of the death, turning murder into suicide, or pinning the blame on someone else. The truth is told through subtle clues taken from the crime scene.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: A victim usually never foresees danger when the perpetrator turns out to be a friend or a lover. Science and microscopic evidence can unmask these killers and find justice for those who are Loved To Death.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: No one is more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is torn by conflicting emotions when he meets the town's new preacher, a former outlaw whom the Rifleman vowed to kill.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The town of North Fork becomes a haven for outlaws when suave Ben Judson smooth-talks his way into the marshal's job.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A handsome gambler moves into town and begins wooing Milly Scott, claiming to have known her deceased brother.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas develops temporary amnesia from a head injury while visiting a strange town and mistakenly assumes the identity of a wanted criminal.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former neighbor of the McCains' is released from jail after serving his sentence for robbery. Lucas lets the man work for him but the new hand holds a secret.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas, Mark, and Micah get lost in Old Mexico, they are held hostage by a group of bandits who intend to kill the men and take Mark as a slave.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While trapped in the ghost town saloon, Lucas tries to come up with a plan to escape with his son and Micah after Mark refuses to leave without him.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou Mallory arrives in North Fork and starts buying up land and businesses. Lou and Lucas start disliking each other after she reveals plans to build a railroad on "worthless" land.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a woman arrives in North Fork with symptoms of smallpox, Lucas, Lou Mallory, Doctor Burrage, and hotel occupants are quarantined in the hotel with an outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gunslinger Johnny Drako rides into town and tells the bartender that he is looking for Lucas McCain. After Johnny leaves the saloon, Sweeney hurries to tell Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A man arrives in North Fork, intending to marry Lou Mallory. The hotel owner looks for a way out from marrying the man to whom her dying father promised her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An assassination plot unfolds as four gunmen disguised as cavalrymen enter North Fork. Their target: Sen. Jim Borden. Their weapon: a Gatling gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Sharpshooter Marty Blair tries to persuade Lucas to buy Mark a rifle. After Lucas shoots a man during a robbery at the hotel, Mark and Lucas disagree with his character.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Fast-draw artist Wade Randall is in town, bragging of his gun battles with notorious bad men until one of them shows up to challenge his story.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When Lucas refuses to sell his land, Mr. Prescott will stop at nothing to change his mind. He hires men to try to persuade Lucas, but he refuses.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark's careless actions cause the death of a friend. Unable to accept the truth, he blames the rifle and runs away from home. Soon, he is faced with a tough decision.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Nils Swenson takes the marshal's place for a few days while Micah is away. To maintain peace, Nils insists that anyone coming into town must turn in their weapons.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas's self-confidence begins to slip away when he misses an easy shot that could have cost Mark his life.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A murder occurs at a railroad camp and a young Indian friend of Lucas is accused of the killing. When Lucas tries to help the boy, he finds himself on trial.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Mark come upon Winslow Quince, a peddler whose wagon has broken down. They help him bring his wagon to North Fork for repair.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Gridley Mau, the son of a man Lucas killed during an attempted robbery, comes to North Fork looking for revenge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The first railroad train is coming to the new North Fork station. Onboard is a Japanese nobleman and his servant, visiting the West to learn about the United States.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: At Halloween, rustlers take advantage of the seasonal disguises to raid a cattle ranch. Lucas' faith in his son's honesty is shaken when he hears rumors of Mark being mixed up with the thieves.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark and Lucas run into Micah on the trail and help when the prisoner he is transporting injures his arm. Lucas' life is endangered when a snake crawls into his bed.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: While Mark goes hunting for Old Spike, Lucas goes hunting for his mortal enemy. Lucas is thrown into jail to stop him from murdering his former friend.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is baffled when the marshal of a neighboring town refuses to hold a gambler who just attempted murder.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An astronaut arrives back on Earth, then notices things have changed in his absence.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man considers several possibilities when offered one wish by a genie.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The curator of a murderers' row in a soon-to-be-defunct wax museum persuades the owner to let him keep the figures for awhile.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A bored, wealthy businessman gets a chance to go back in time and start over, armed with all the knowledge he's acquired.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Toy designer Horace Ford spends most of his time reminiscing about his idyllic childhood. But when he gets a chance to go back to those years he gets a bitter taste of reality.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man named Benteen leads a colony of Americans stranded on a desert planet for 30 years.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A young couple book passage on a trans-Atlantic cruise, hoping to salvage their marriage.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An untalented would-be writer's career takes off when the ghost of William Shakespeare writes his script.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An alcoholic bookie regrets that he wasn't a better father to his son, Pip, critically wounded in South Vietnam. A visit to an amusement park gives them both a second chance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Boxing robot "Battling Maxo" breaks down before the scheduled bout, forcing his manager to take its place.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Mr. Wilson believes he sees a gremlin on the wing of the commercial aircraft he is taking back home... from the sanitarium, where he has been committed for six months after a mental breakdown during a similar flight.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Patrick Thomas McNulty, a long-winded and self-absorbed know-it-all, is given a fantastic device which brings literal meaning to the expression "stop the world; I want to get off."

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A dejected jockey wants to be tall.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Erich is displeased when his wife buys an expensive doll for his step-daughter. He becomes even more displeased when the doll tells him it doesn't like him!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A mysterious guardian helps a tiny community survive after the Bomb destroys much of the Earth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Barbara accidentally causes her cruel Uncle Simon's death. His will stipulates that she must care for his latest invention - a robot. The robot begins to take on Uncle Simon's traits.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea and Michonne witness an accident that leads them to a new group of survivors, but when tensions arise with their new acquaintances, they must make a decision.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group becomes severed, putting lives in jeopardy; in Woodbury, Merle approaches the Governor to make a request.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick struggles after another loss; Michonne grows more suspicious of the Governor, who throws a party for the people of Woodbury.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea and the Governor grow closer while Michonne makes a decision about Woodbury; Glenn and Maggie go on a run; Rick struggles with grief.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A new guest at the prison forces Rick's hand; members of the group go on a mission to rescue Glenn and Maggie; the Governor presses for information.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea steps up when the people of Woodbury are thrown into uncharted territory; a new threat arises at the prison.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick tries to save one of his group; Woodbury is in disarray; new guests at the prison raise concerns.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group debates the next step; Rick searches for a lost friend; Daryl and Merle question their choices; the Governor restores order.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Realizing they're running out of supplies, the group must make a choice when security is threatened; Andrea goes to the prison to attempt a negotiation.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Realizing they are outgunned, Rick leads an expedition to get more weapons and fortify their group against the Governor and his forces.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick and the Governor convene for a tense negotiation of a peace treaty between their respective groups, hoping to prevent more deaths.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Governor chases a fleeing dissenter; while the Governor is gone, a traitor tries to sabotage his plans.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The group lives a more peaceful life at the prison and strives to hold onto humanity; problems arise when Rick encounters a new survivor.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Facing a new enemy, Rick abandons his quiet lifestyle so that he and the others can fight to protect their hard-won livelihood.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: A group leaves the prison to search for supplies; the remaining members of the group deal with recent losses.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and a small group set out on foot in search of medicine, but their mission faces obstacles; Rick and Carol find two uninfected stragglers in a nearby town.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El Gobernador y sus hombres lanzan un ataque contra la prisión, pero el grupo de Rick se defiende. Al final de la contienda, solo una de las dos comunidades podrá seguir existiendo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo encuentra refugio en las instalaciones de una prisión federal abandonada tras meses en la carretera. Rick considera que se trata de un lugar seguro para que Lori pase los últimos meses de embarazo, pero quizá se haya equivocado.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick accede a dejar salir de sus celdas a los prisioneros si les ayudan a matar a los zombis que quedan en la prisión. Entretanto, la salud de Hershel empeora por momentos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Andrea y Michonne descubren una comunidad de sobrevivientes liderada por un hombre llamado el Gobernador. Allá les ofrecen medicinas, comida, agua caliente y ropa limpia, pero Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y sus verdaderas intenciones.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En Woodbury, Michonne desconfía del Gobernador y planea irse sin Andrea. En la prisión, un sabotaje provoca que una horda de zombis penetre en la cárcel y, mientras Rick y sus compañeros los combaten, Lori entra en trabajo de parto.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick está totalmente abatido por la muerte de Lori, pero recibe una llamada telefónica sorprendente. Entretanto, Michonne ha descubierto el secreto del Gobernador y se dispone a abandonar Woodbury, a pesar de que Andrea quiere permanecer allá.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne ve a Glenn y Maggie buscando provisiones, pero alguien más los observa: Merle, quien reconoce a Glenn como uno de los que le abandonó, a merced de los zombis, en una azotea de Atlanta. Entretanto, Rick sigue mentalmente inestable.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Michonne conduce a Rick, Daryl y Oscar a Woodbury para rescatar a Glenn y Maggie, a quienes el Gobernador está torturando para sonsacarles dónde se oculta el grupo de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de Rick invade Woodbury con la intención de rescatar a Glenn y Maggie. Michonne descubre el secreto familiar que oculta el Gobernador cuando trata de asesinarlo. En la prisión, un grupo desconocido atraviesa la verja de seguridad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Después de la batalla contra el Gobernador, Rick y Carl encuentran una casa en la que Rick intenta reponerse de sus graves heridas y Carl sale en busca de alimentos. Mientras, Michonne trata de encontrarlos.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En secreto, el Gobernador y sus hombres preparan una incursión mortal contra la prisión. Darryl y Merle lleguen en mitad de la contienda.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El Gobernador permite a Andrea, acompañada de Milton, ir a la prisión a negociar la paz con su antiguo grupo. Mientras, Tyreese y Sasha llegan a Woodbury y le ofrecen al Gobernador información sobre la prisión a cambio de poder quedarse allá.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los supervivientes de Woodbury se han unido al grupo de Rick en la prisión, crían animales, cultivan y todo parece ir bien. Sin embargo, el grupo va a descubrir que el peligro no siempre llega desde afuera.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick establece una cuarentena para evitar que el virus se propague entre la población de la cárcel. Tyreese descubre que alguien ha asesinado y quemado los cadáveres de su novia y su amigo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl encabeza un grupo que sale de la cárcel en busca de medicamentos y, durante el trayecto, oyen por radio que alguien habla de un santuario. Rick averigua quién asesinó a Karen y David y por qué lo hizo.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick y Carol salen en busca de comida y ocurre algo que cambia su relación para siempre. Mientras, el otro grupo sigue buscando medicinas y, durante la misión, Bob le confiesa a Tyreese que es alcohólico.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West meets up again with his old enemy, Dr. Miguelito Loveless, who is engaged in a whimsical plan for wholesale murder.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret Agent West challenges a bizarre scheme to control San Francisco Bay Shipping with rockets fired from Alcatraz Island.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent West vows to destroy Raven, an organization that induces influential citizens to commit sabotage through mind conditioning.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent West's bizarre behavior convinces his cohorts that he has become another victim of the Raven's mind-conditioning plot.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A dying man's request to preserve a legacy for his young ward sends James T. West to Missouri, where he faces a wholesale conspiracy.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: An Army sergeant's letter to President Grant sends agents West and Gordon to a lonely outpost to fight a gang of terrorists.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A tempestuous diva becomes involved in a New Orleans puzzle when kidnappers attempt to abduct her during a singing performance.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: An assignment to take possession of a priceless diamond for the National Museum takes James West to an eerie island estate.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West aids a Russian prince in recovering an all-important icon, sought also by a desperate, dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agent James T. West is exposed to a deadly plague when he tries to rescue a governor's daughter from a band of stagecoach robbers.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: The board of directors of a corporation owned by a spinsterish tycoon appears to be the target of an insidious plot.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Masquerading as a polished gunfighter with a dishonorable discharge from the Army, James T. West arrives in Quemada, New Mexico, in a plush private railroad carwith orders from President Ulysses S. Grant to quell the terrorist activities.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Jim West and Artemus Gordon match wits with an arch-criminal of grandiose ambitions that plans to reclaim the empire of Mexico and establish himself as a new Napoleon.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin O'Connor heads to Del Ray Beach, Florida to restore Terrazzo floors. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Tom helps a homeowner repair a cracked floor joist.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard heads to Cheyenne, Wyoming to help a homeowner install a toilet. The guys ask "What Is It?" And, Roger and Kevin patch a lawn with grass seed.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Scott helps hang a flat panel TV on the wall and conceal wiring. Scott shows Kevin examples of many different types of electrical outlets. Roger helps control insect pests without using pesticides.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin learns how to maintain kitchen appliances. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Tom helps a homeowner install a rain gutter, downspout, and rain barrel.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Kevin build a storage bench for an entryway. Richard demonstrates how to solder copper pipes properly. Afterward, landscape contractor Roger Cook helps maintain an overgrown perennial garden.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Roger visits a tropical botanic garden to learn how to care for orchids as houseplants. The guys ask "What Is It?" Afterward, Tom helps a homeowner purchase and install a kitchen wall cabinet.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard learns corn harvesting and storage, then helps seal and insulate ductwork. Roger shares advice on proper pruning. The guys ask "What Is It?" and Kevin shows how to maintain washers & dryers.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Richard and Kevin install a ductless heat pump. The guys ask "What Is It?" Scott demonstrates new technologies and applications for LED lighting. Roger shows how to select the best houseplants.

programme.title: Ask This Old House

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Marco Antonio Barrera II
programme.desc: On June 22nd, 2002 Erik Morales faced Marco Antonio Barrera for a second time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for the WBC world featherweight title in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Erik Morales vs Marco Antonio Barrera III
programme.desc: On November 27th, 2004 Erik Morales and Marco Antonio Barrera faced eachother for the third and final time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Barrera.

programme.title: Evander Holyfield vs Larry Holmes
programme.desc: On June 19th, 1992 Evander Holyfield battles Larry Holmes for the IBF, WBA, and WBC World Heavyweight title they battled at Caesars Palace in Las Vegas the bout went a full twelve rounds and ended in a unanimous decision win for Holyfield.

programme.title: Felix Trinidad vs Oscar De La Hoya
programme.desc: On September 18th, 1999 Felix Trinidad and Oscar De La Hoya faced eachother for the IBF and WBC World welterweight title at the Mandalay Bay Resort in Las Vegas that ended in a majority decision win for Trinidad.

programme.title: Floyd Mayeather vs Jose Luis Castillo 2
programme.desc: On December 7th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather faced Jose Luis Castillo for a second time at Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles resulting in a unamimous decision win for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather Jr vs Justin Juuko
programme.desc: On May 22nd, 1999 Floyd Mayweather fought Justin Juuko at the Mandalay Bay Resort & Casino in Las Vegas for the WBC World Super featherweight title with the bout ending in round nine resulting in a victory for Mayweather

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Arturo Gatti
programme.desc: On June 25th, 2005 Floyd Mayweather fought Arturo Gatti at the Boardwalk Hall in Atlantic City for the WBC World Super Lightweight title with Gatti down in round 1 the fight ended in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Carlos Alberto Ramon Rios
programme.desc: On February 17th, 1999, Floyd Mayweather fought Carlos Rios for the WBC Super Featherweight Title in Grand Rapids, Michigan. Rios was a tough opponent for Mayweather, but Mayweather prevailed and showed out in front of his hometown, winning by UD.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Diego Corrales
programme.desc: On January 20th, 2001 Floyd Mayweather faced Diego Corrales in a battle for the WBC World super feather weight titles at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas ending in a technical knockout victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Jose Luis Castillo 1
programme.desc: On April 20th, 2002 Floyd Mayweather fought Jose Luis Castillo for the first time at the MGM Grand in Las Vegas for WBC World lightweight titles in a bout that went 12 rounds ending in a victory for Mayweather.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs DeMarcus Corley
programme.desc: On February 26th, 2005 Miguel Cotto fought DeMarcus Corley for the WBO World Super Lightweight title at the Coliseo Ruben Rodriguez in Bayamon with Corley going down twice in the 5th round securing the technical knockout victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Hector Arroyo
programme.desc: On January 9th, 1998, Floyd Mayweather fought Hector Arroyo in a featherweight bout in Biloxi, Mississippi. A young Mayweather hungry for a title shot came out quick against Arroyo, stopping him in the fifth round of the fight.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Larry O'Shields
programme.desc: On June 14th, 1997, Floyd Mayweather fought Larry O'Shields in a lightweight bout at the Alamodome in San Antonio, Texas. A young Mayweather showed his impressive speed and agility, earning a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Manny Pacquiao
programme.desc: On May 2nd, 2015, Floyd Mayweather fought Manny Pacquiao in what was labeled as the "Fight of the Century." Floyd Mayweather emerged victorious via a unanimous decision, showcasing his exceptional defensive skills against Pacquiao's aggressive style.

programme.title: Floyd Mayweather vs Zab Judah
programme.desc: On April 8th, 2006, Floyd Mayweather fought Zab Judah for the IBF and IBO Welterweight Titles at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. In a fight with a dramatic melee in round 10, Mayweather cruised in the later rounds to win by unanimous decision.

programme.title: Freddie Roach vs Joe Ruelaz
programme.desc: On August 9th, 1984, Freddie Roach fought Joe Ruelaz in a super featherweight bout in Las Vegas. The more experienced Roach made easy work of Ruelaz, stopping him in the fourth round.

programme.desc: The truckers continue their look back at their experiences during the last ice road season and explain what they do now that they're off the ice. We'll also take a look at the town of Yellowknife--and the mining industry--and see what life is like.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: On one of the coldest frontiers on the planet, the Ice Road Truckers brave treacherous terrain to deliver crucial supplies to northern diamond mines. Take a look back at the highs and lows of the first season.
